text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is drawing near, and
attention starts to focus on the showdown
between Narita Brian and Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap makes it clear that she won't relinquish
victory, while Narita Brian quietly ignites her own
competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Biwa Hayahide learns that Narita
Brian is aiming for the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's holding out hope that she'll be able to make
it in time for year's end.
